title: trachycarpus excelsus
intro: Trachycarpus excelsus, also known as the Windmill Palm, is a species of palm tree native to southern China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing cholesterol levels, lowering blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis. In herbal preparations, the Windmill Palm is used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to support cardiovascular health and immune system function.
